nodes.name: Mérida flowerpiercer
nodes.summary: The Mérida flowerpiercer (Diglossa gloriosa) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Mérida flowerpiercer (Diglossa gloriosa) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Venezuela.

nodes.name: Mérida flowerpiercer
nodes.summary: Mérida flowerpiercer（Diglossa gloriosa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mérida flowerpiercer。

nodes.name: Diglossa
nodes.summary: Diglossa（Diglossa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Chestnut-bellied flowerpiercer、Glossy flowerpiercer、Moustached flowerpiercer等14种鸟类。
